key.name: transcription-model
key.description: Model name sent to the transcription endpoint.

key.name: api-key
key.description: API key used as a bearer token. Leave empty for unauthenticated endpoints.

key.name: language
key.description: Optional language hint such as en.

key.name: response-format
key.description: Response format sent to the endpoint. Typical values are json or text.

key.name: proxy-enabled
key.description: Enable SOCKS5 proxy for transcription API requests.

key.name: proxy-host
key.description: Hostname or IP address of the SOCKS5 proxy server.

key.name: proxy-port
key.description: Port used by the SOCKS5 proxy server.

key.name: proxy-username
key.description: Optional username for SOCKS5 proxy authentication.

key.name: proxy-password
key.description: Optional password for SOCKS5 proxy authentication.

key.name: toggle-recording-shortcut
key.summary: Shortcut for starting or stopping recording
key.description: Press this shortcut to toggle recording.
